summary: Frontend testing of three new features: PersonaMaskBanner dropdown hot-switching, Stories Supabase Realtime subscription, and Accept All button for message requests. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: 404 errors for some user avatars - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: PersonaMaskBanner.js: Excellent implementation of interactive dropdown with data-testid attributes for all persona options
PersonaMaskBanner.js line 51-61: Dropdown correctly closes on outside click with useRef/useEffect pattern
PersonaMaskBanner.js line 67-79: God Mode option properly styled with checkmark indicator
PersonaMaskBanner.js line 85-192: Persona categories (Pro Athletes, Photographers, Businesses, Surfers) well organized
Stories.js line 37-103: Supabase Realtime subscription properly set up with INSERT/DELETE event handlers and cleanup on unmount
Stories.js line 64-79: Toast notification for new stories with auto-refresh after 2 seconds
MessagesPage.js line 1027-1053: handleAcceptAllRequests uses Promise.all for parallel acceptance with proper error handling
MessagesPage.js line 1212-1230: Accept All button correctly shows only when >1 pending requests in folder
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features are working: (1) PersonaMaskBanner now has interactive dropdown for hot-switching personas, banner color changes from red (God Mode) to cyan (persona). (2) Stories component has Supabase Realtime subscription that logs 'SUBSCRIBED' status. (3) Accept All button code is implemented but requires >1 pending message request to appear in UI.

persona_banner_dropdown.description: Banner dropdown opens when clicking persona name, shows categorized options (Pro Athletes, Photographers, Businesses, Surfers) with God Mode (Native) at top

dynamic_persona_switching.description: Selecting persona from dropdown instantly updates banner color and text without page reload

persona_persistence.description: Selected persona persists when navigating between pages (Messages, Profile, Feed)

exit_to_god_mode.description: EXIT button returns user to God Mode (Native) with red banner

pro_lounge_visibility.description: Pro Lounge folder hidden when viewing as Surfer persona, visible in God Mode

stories_supabase_realtime.description: Console shows '[Stories Realtime] Subscription status: SUBSCRIBED' - INSERT/DELETE listeners configured

accept_all_button.description: Button implemented with data-testid='accept-all-requests-btn', appears only when >1 pending requests exist
